_comment: DRAFT proposal for Gabe's review — NOT yet wired into any UI. Campaign -> buyer-segment mapping for the Segment Performance section. Resolution order applied by the classifier: (1) exact `overrides` match wins, (2) else the first `rules` entry whose match_any hits the campaign_name (top-to-bottom), (3) else if any `mixed_signals` token hits -> 'Mixed', (4) else 'Unclassified'. Matching is case-insensitive; match_any values are regex fragments. 'Mixed' campaigns can later be replaced with a split-allocation object, e.g. {"type":"split","allocation":{"Audiology":0.4,"Office / Privacy":0.6}}. The override list below only covers campaigns visible so far in screenshots — the read-only diagnostic endpoint will classify the FULL live campaign set from marketing_campaigns so we can fill the gaps before building the UI.

review_flags.Telehealth / Therapy Booths: Mapped to Audiology (medical/therapy use). Could be Office / Privacy (private telehealth rooms). Confirm.
review_flags.Soundproofing (US/CAN) - Home Soundproof: Flagged Mixed — 'home soundproofing' spans Music / Recording (home studio) and Office / Privacy (home office). Confirm or set a split.
review_flags.**LP Soundproof (US/CAN) - B: Generic soundproofing lander — flagged Mixed pending a landing-page-URL signal.
